Papa Gruff is eager to rid Gridania of his wicked brethren.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Papa Gruff is eager to rid Gridania of his wicked brethren.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Papa Gruff decides that the best course of action will be to split up. Claiming responsibility for the troubled botanist and lingering voidsent in the Greatloam Growery, he sends you off towards eastern Gridania, where he senses more voidsent lurk. Wand in hand, you sally forth to flush out the lingering spooks with your pumpkin-producing All Saints' Charm.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
